memes.label: Al Mason
memes.description: Al Mason is a Continental Detective Agency operative who works alongside the Continental Op on the Leggett case, handling surveillance and field assignments throughout the investigation of the Dain curse murders.

memes.description: Complete index of all wiki entries for The Dain Curse, organized by type and quality tier.

memes.label: Characters
memes.description: Complete index of all characters in The Dain Curse, dynamically generated from wiki pages.

memes.label: Concepts
memes.description: Index of themes, ideas, and abstract topics in The Dain Curse, dynamically generated from concept-type wiki pages.

memes.label: Daisy Cotton
memes.description: Daisy Cotton is the wife of Marshal Dick Cotton and a minor but pivotal witness in The Dain Curse, whose coerced confession exposes Harvey Whidden's role in the kidnapping and murder of Eric Collinson.

memes.label: Devil's Island
memes.description: The French penal colony in South America where Maurice Leggett was imprisoned after being convicted of Lily Dain's murder.

memes.label: Dull Point
memes.description: The rocky coastal promontory below which a bootlegger's hiding-place conceals a key figure in the investigation, featured in Chapter XVII.

memes.label: Events
memes.description: Chronological index of all key events in The Dain Curse, dynamically generated from event-type wiki pages.

memes.label: Fitzstephan's Confession
memes.description: Owen Fitzstephan, confronted by the Continental Op in his hospital room, admits to being the mastermind behind the Dain curse murders and reveals himself as a Dain by blood.

memes.label: Gabrielle's Flight to the Temple
memes.description: After witnessing Ruppert's murder in the Leggett kitchen, Gabrielle flees her home and takes refuge at the Temple of the Holy Grail, placing herself under the influence of the Haldorns.

relations.label: The Temple of the Holy Grail

memes.label: Gabrielle's Suicide Attempt
memes.description: After discovering her husband Eric Collinson's body at the foot of the Quesada cliffs, Gabrielle tries twice to shoot herself but lacks the courage to pull the trigger.

memes.label: Golden Gate Avenue
memes.description: The location in San Francisco where the body of the supposed burglar is taken for identification, triggering the novel's first major plot development.

memes.label: Harvey Whidden
memes.description: A big-boned, deliberate man from Quesada who murdered Eric Collinson and kidnapped Gabrielle Collinson in an attempt to extract ransom money.

memes.label: Hubert Collinson
memes.description: Father of Eric Collinson, a calm San Francisco businessman who becomes a client of the Continental Detective Agency in The Dain Curse.

memes.label: Jack Santos
memes.description: Jack Santos is a San Francisco newspaper reporter who follows the Dain curse case, appearing at key moments in Quesada to gather information and providing a window into the press coverage of the investigation.

memes.label: Laurence Collinson
memes.description: Brother of Eric Collinson, who supports Gabrielle through the aftermath of the Dain Curse case and appears in the novel's epilogue.

memes.label: Louis Upton
memes.description: Louis Upton was a New York private detective who played a crucial role in the backstory of The Dain Curse—his investigation at Alice Dain's request ultimately led to the exposure of Edgar Leggett's true identity as Maurice de Mayenne, setting the entire plot in motion.

memes.label: Marshal Dick Cotton
memes.description: The pompous and unintelligent town marshal of Quesada, whose wife Daisy Cotton was having an affair with Harvey Whidden.

memes.label: Mrs. Rodman
memes.description: Mrs. Rodman is a minor character in The Dain Curse, a resident of Quesada who provides local knowledge and context during the investigation into the events surrounding the Dain family and the Temple of the Holy Grail.

memes.label: Paris, 1913
memes.description: The site of the original Dain family tragedy — the murder of Lily Dain in Paris on June 6, 1913, the event that set the entire chain of events in motion.

memes.label: Pat Reddy
memes.description: A young, jovial district attorney investigator who assists the Continental Op in the Leggett murder case in The Dain Curse.

memes.label: Places
memes.description: Directory of all locations in The Dain Curse, dynamically generated from place-type wiki pages.

memes.label: Rhino Tingley
memes.description: A minor criminal figure in San Francisco connected to the diamond smuggling underworld in The Dain Curse.

memes.label: San Francisco Bay Area
memes.description: The broader regional setting of The Dain Curse, encompassing San Francisco, the East Bay, and the coastal communities south of the city including Quesada.

memes.label: Sheriff Feeney
memes.description: The county sheriff involved in the investigation of events at the House in the Cove and Quesada in The Dain Curse.

memes.label: The Cliff Road
memes.description: The dangerous coastal path near Quesada where the Continental Op discovers a body at the base of the cliff, a pivotal scene in Chapter XIII.

memes.label: The Collinson House
memes.description: Eric Collinson's home and the site of his murder, a key crime scene in the novel's later chapters.

memes.label: The Curse Speech
memes.description: Alice Dain Leggett's dramatic, hate-filled proclamation of the Dain curse upon her stepdaughter Gabrielle, delivered over the body of Edgar Leggett in the laboratory.

memes.label: The Death of Aaronia Haldorn
memes.description: Aaronia Haldorn is found unconscious and bound on the altar steps of the Temple after a violent confrontation, likely killed by her husband Joseph or by Fitzstephan's agents.

relations.label: The Temple of the Holy Grail

memes.label: The Diamond Theft
memes.description: Inciting incident in which unset diamonds are stolen from Edgar Leggett's laboratory cabinet, launching the Continental Op's investigation.

memes.label: The Discovery of the Body
memes.description: The body of a murdered man — later identified as Upton — is found in a shabby apartment on Golden Gate Avenue, the first homicide in the diamond theft investigation.

memes.label: The Final Confrontation
memes.description: The Continental Op confronts Owen Fitzstephan in his county hospital room, methodically exposing him as the mastermind behind all the Dain curse murders and forcing his confession.

memes.label: The Haldorn Residence
memes.description: The private living quarters of Joseph and Aaronia Haldorn within the Temple of the Holy Grail building, where much of the cult's behind-the-scenes manipulation takes place.

memes.label: The Haldorns' Exposure
memes.description: The fraudulent operations of the Temple of the Holy Grail are revealed, exposing Joseph and Aaronia Haldorn's cult as an elaborate scheme of psychological manipulation, drugging, and murder.

relations.label: The Temple of the Holy Grail

memes.label: The Laboratory
memes.description: Edgar Leggett's scientific laboratory on the third floor of his house, where diamonds were stored, experiments conducted, and a crucial confession made.

memes.label: The Leggett House
memes.description: The Leggett family home in San Francisco, site of the diamond theft and central to the novel's opening mystery.

memes.label: The Murder of Alice Dain
memes.description: Alice Dain Leggett is killed in a stairway struggle after delivering a dramatic curse speech to Gabrielle and attempting to flee the Leggett house.

memes.label: The Murder of Eric Collinson
memes.description: Eric Collinson, Gabrielle's husband, is pushed off a cliff in Quesada by Harvey Whidden, a killing commissioned by Owen Fitzstephan to remove the last obstacle to his possession of Gabrielle.

memes.label: The Paris Murder 1913
memes.description: The backstory murder of Lily Dain in Paris by her husband Maurice de Mayenne (Edgar Leggett), the originating event of the Dain curse mythology and the family's criminal trajectory.

memes.label: The Pineapple
memes.description: The setting of the bombing incident in Chapter XVIII, where a "pineapple" — slang for a hand grenade — is thrown into a room, escalating the violence of the investigation.

memes.label: The Recovery of the Diamonds
memes.description: The seven unset diamonds stolen from Leggett's cabinet are recovered — found grouped by his head on the laboratory table — allowing the Continental Detective Agency to close the Leggett case.

memes.label: The Temple Altar
memes.description: The brilliant white, crystal, and silver altar in the Temple of the Holy Grail where Doctor Riese's murdered body was discovered.

memes.label: The Temple Building
memes.description: The six-story yellow brick building on Pacific Avenue that housed the Temple of the Holy Grail cult.
aliases: Temple of the Holy Grail building

memes.label: The Temple of the Holy Grail
The Temple of the Holy Grail (Organization)
aliases: Temple of the Holy Grail organization

memes.label: Tom Fink
memes.description: Stage mechanic and illusionist who built and operated the mechanical apparatus for the Haldorns' Temple of the Holy Grail.
